description: 30 diverse IT scenarios — post Gemini-first classifier (Set V)

cases.title: Smart Card Reader Not Detected
cases.description: PIV smart card reader not recognized on Windows laptop after dock firmware update. Cannot authenticate to secure systems.

cases.title: Spear Phishing Targeting CFO
cases.description: Security incident: CFO received targeted email with malicious attachment. User did not open but reported suspicious sender domain mimicking our bank.

cases.title: MPLS Circuit Down Primary Site
cases.description: MPLS WAN circuit to primary datacenter is completely down. All branch offices lost connectivity to ERP and email relay.

cases.title: SQL Server Always On Failover Failed
cases.description: SQL Server Always On availability group failed over but secondary replica shows NOT SYNCHRONIZED. Reporting dashboards offline.

cases.title: Jira Board Access for Contractor
cases.description: Contractor needs contributor access to Jira project OPS board for 90-day engagement. NDA signed, manager approved via ServiceNow.

cases.title: Excel Crashes Opening Large Macro File
cases.description: Microsoft Excel crashes immediately when opening 80MB macro-enabled workbook from finance share. Other Office apps work fine.

cases.title: S3 Bucket Publicly Accessible
cases.description: Security incident: AWS Config alert shows customer-data S3 bucket has public read ACL. Need immediate lockdown and audit of access logs.

cases.title: Wi-Fi 6 AP Offline Building B
cases.description: All Wi-Fi access points on floor 3 Building B show offline in Meraki dashboard. Wired connections on same floor work.

cases.title: Redis Cluster Memory Maxed Out
cases.description: Production Redis cluster hitting maxmemory limit. Cache eviction causing session drops for web portal users.

cases.title: Laptop Keyboard Keys Sticking
cases.description: Several keys on Dell Latitude keyboard stick or register double presses. External USB keyboard works normally.

cases.title: Power BI Gateway Connection Failed
cases.description: On-premises Power BI data gateway shows offline. Scheduled refresh jobs failing for executive dashboards.

cases.title: Terminated Employee Still Has VPN
cases.description: Security incident: former employee VPN session still active 48 hours after termination. Need immediate session kill and credential revocation audit.

cases.title: DNSSEC Validation Failures External
cases.description: External DNS queries failing DNSSEC validation for our public domain. Customer-facing portal intermittently unreachable.

cases.title: Azure AD Conditional Access Block
cases.description: Users blocked by Conditional Access policy when signing in from India office. Policy updated yesterday, entire Bangalore team locked out.

cases.title: Veeam Backup Chain Broken
cases.description: Veeam incremental backup chain broken for VM cluster. Full backup required but repository only 5% free space remaining.

cases.title: Intune Compliance Block on iPhone
cases.description: Corporate iPhone blocked by Intune compliance — device encryption not detected after iOS 18 update. Cannot access company email.

cases.title: Projector HDMI No Signal Conference Room
cases.description: Conference room 4B projector shows no signal from room PC via HDMI switcher. Cable swap and input change did not help.

cases.title: Snowflake Warehouse Credit Exhausted
cases.description: Snowflake warehouse suspended — monthly credit quota exhausted on analytics warehouse. BI team cannot run ad-hoc queries.

cases.title: VS Code Remote SSH Extension Fails
cases.description: Visual Studio Code Remote SSH extension hangs on Connecting to remote Linux dev server. PuTTY SSH from same laptop works.

cases.title: NAC Quarantine VLAN Wrong Assignment
cases.description: Network access control placing compliant laptops in quarantine VLAN. Users get IP but cannot reach internal resources or internet.

cases.title: Service Account Password Rotation
cases.description: Scheduled rotation for svc-jenkins AD service account failed. CI/CD pipelines failing authentication to artifact repository.

cases.title: Malware Detected on Developer Laptop
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike detected trojan on developer laptop. Machine isolated by EDR, need forensics and reimage.

cases.title: SAN LUN Mapping Missing New Host
cases.description: New VMware host cannot see assigned SAN LUNs after storage migration. VMotion fails with incompatible datastore.

cases.title: Webex Camera Not Working
cases.description: Cisco Webex shows camera in use by another application but no other app is open. Video calls show black tile.

cases.title: LDAP Sync Failure to SaaS App
cases.description: LDAP directory sync to Atlassian Cloud failing with invalid credentials error. New hires not appearing in Jira/Confluence.

cases.title: Load Balancer Health Check Failing
cases.description: F5 load balancer marking all pool members down. Health check HTTP 503 on backend app servers though SSH to nodes works.

cases.title: Workday SSO Login Loop
cases.description: Workday HCM login redirects in infinite loop after browser cookie clear. SAML trace shows repeated IdP requests.

cases.title: Tape Library Robot Arm Jammed
cases.description: Physical tape library robot arm jammed during weekly offsite backup rotation. Backup exec jobs queued and failing.

cases.title: Elasticsearch Cluster Yellow State
cases.description: Elasticsearch cluster stuck in yellow state — unassigned shards on logging cluster. Kibana dashboards timing out.

cases.title: Bitbucket Pipeline Secret Exposed in Log
cases.description: Security incident: Bitbucket pipeline log printed database password in plain text. Repo is private but 12 developers have access.
